TIMELINE_PLAYER.description: Interactive year-by-year scenario player allowing users to step forward/backward through simulated temporal milestones (+1Y, +2Y, +5Y).

PROBABILITY_GAUGE.description: Real-time gauge displaying cumulative path success probability and accumulated risk score.

WHAT_IF_INJECTOR.description: Interactive panel allowing users to inject hypothetical shocks (e.g. inflation surge, language test drop, job loss) into any target timeline year.

PLAN_B_CANVAS.description: Visual auxiliary canvas highlighting Plan B hedging triggers when cumulative risk score exceeds threshold.
